title: 揚げたてのサクサクを！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm returning from looking at sports equipment
with Eishin Flash when...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... I know that sweet and buttery scent from
somewhere...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Could it be coming from that shop? That German
bakery looks new.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Why, those are Schneeballen! They look fresh out
of the oven and absolutely delicious.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They're a famous deep-fried pastry from
Germany. They're sweet and crispy and come with
a variety of toppings.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Look, they even have some covered in roasted
soybean flour—a truly Japanese topping.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Soy isn't as sweet as chocolate or powdered
sugar, so I imagine it gives the pastry a rich,
earthy aroma.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Ahem. That said, it is almost dinnertime, so I
should refrain from indulging on pastries.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Snacking now would upset my daily caloric
balance.
choice_data_list: Why don't we share one together?
Why don't we share one together?

There's no need to hold back after all that
walking today!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Snacking now would upset my daily caloric
balance.
choice_data_list: Why don't we share one together?
Why don't we share one together?

There's no need to hold back after all that
walking today!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sharing one?! ...That's a wonderful idea.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'll go buy us a soy Schneeball right away.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ah... It was as delicious as the toasted scent made
it seem. That was scrumptious.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It had a softer, fluffier texture than the
Schneeball my parents sell at their shop.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The dough wasn't as sweet as the type in
Germany either, and it appears they used a
different kind of frying oil too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad we shared one. I was able to fully enjoy
the treat without worrying about excess calories.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: There isn't? But if I overindulge...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Then again, we walked so much today that we did
use up more energy than usual...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It may be necessary to compensate for that
deficit.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I believe I shall take your advice and replenish my lost energy reserves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash zips into the shop and eats as many
Schneeballen as she can until she can't take
another bite.
